name: ui-1b-baseline-lint
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec eslint site/features/planner/admin/svg-editor/AdminSvgEditorEditView.tsx site/app/admin/svg-editor/[id]/page.tsx site/features/planner/admin/svg-editor/AdminSvgEditorListView.tsx --max-warnings=50 2>&1 | Out-String ; echo 'LINT_UI_DONE'
